commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes `openclaw agent --model`, sends only model-override gateway calls as `gateway-client`/`backend` with `operator.admin`, and adds request-scope assertions to `agent-via-gateway` tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main documents `openclaw agent --model`, sends it as a CLI/write-scoped gateway `agent` request, and the gateway handler rejects model overrides without admin or internal authorization. I did not run a live Gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real Gateway proof before merge; terminal output, a terminal screenshot, redacted logs, or a recording showing `openclaw agent --model` succeeding against a real Gateway would satisfy the gate and updating the PR body should trigger re-review.
